# kSecCSBasicValidateOnly

**Global Variable**

Do not validate either the main executable or the bundle resources, if any.

## Declaration

```swift
var kSecCSBasicValidateOnly: UInt32 { get }
```

## Discussion

This flag is the bitwise OR of the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecCSDoNotValidateExecutable] and [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecCSDoNotValidateResources] flags.
title: kSecCSBasicValidateOnly
